posts.title: What 'Done' Actually Means in Stewardship
posts.excerpt: In stewardship, done is not the moment work looks impressive. It is the moment responsibility has been carried to a faithful, sustainable finish.

posts.title: The Cost of a Quick Yes
posts.excerpt: A fast yes can feel responsive, generous, and strategic. It can also conceal the trade-offs you have not yet named.

posts.title: When Capacity Is the Leadership Issue
posts.excerpt: Leadership problems are not always failures of vision. Sometimes the issue is capacity that has been stretched past what careful stewardship can sustain.
